title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Corgi, founded by Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, raised a $108M Series A by rebuilding the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy systems. The founders argue that ambitious thinking, regulatory persistence, and execution depth create defensible moats that money alone cannot replicate.
